query:
SELECT external_id, contract_no, paid_at, amount, description, created_by, created_at
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'ff365' AND paid_at BETWEEN '2024-11-01' AND '2024-11-30'
ORDER BY amount DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT external_id, contract_no, paid_at, amount, description, created_by, created_at

WHERE section = 'ff365' AND paid_at BETWEEN '2024-11-01' AND '2024-11-30'
